semanticChecks.message: Task should be constructible with a name and optional done value.
A Task instance should store name and done attributes.
label() should format a completed task correctly.
label() should format an incomplete task correctly.
Return the label instead of printing it.
count_open should count unfinished tasks in a mixed list.
count_open should return 0 when all tasks are done.
count_open should work for a one-item list.
Return the count instead of printing it.
load_tasks should turn each non-empty line into a Task object with the correct done value.
load_tasks should return data without printing.
build_report should summarize a mixed task list in the required format.
build_report should handle a list where every task is done.
Return the report string instead of printing it.

files.content:
Email|done
Clean|done
Plan trip|open
Pay bill|done
